agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Find broken user flows, inconsistent copy, missing UI states, accessibility gaps, navigation dead ends, and missing error boundaries.

coverage.incomplete_reason: Captured top UX inconsistencies and missing states within timebox; routes beyond the mapped set were not audited in depth.

findings.title: Inconsistent Login Terminology
findings.description: The terms 'Sign in', 'Log in', and 'Open login' are used interchangeably across authentication components, making the primary action unclear.

proof_hooks.summary: Auth forms label the login action differently
Signup form references login with alternate phrasing

findings.impact: Users may hesitate or miss the primary login action because the wording shifts between screens.

suggested_fix.approach: Normalize the login action copy to a single phrase (e.g., 'Log In') across all auth components and related CTAs.

history.notes: Detected inconsistent login terminology across auth forms.

findings.title: Inconsistent Save Terminology
findings.description: 'Save Changes', 'Save', and 'Automatically save changes' are used with varying casing and patterns.
findings.impact: Inconsistent action labels reduce clarity and polish, especially for new users scanning critical actions.

suggested_fix.approach: Standardize casing and phrasing for save actions to a single pattern and propagate via shared copy constants.

history.notes: Observed divergent save terminology in shared copy.

findings.title: Placeholder Text in Production
findings.description: Lorem ipsum placeholder text remains in the production code for UI weight definitions.

proof_hooks.summary: Placeholder text present in signatures definitions

findings.impact: Leaving placeholder copy visible reduces professionalism and can confuse users about intended messaging.

suggested_fix.approach: Replace lorem ipsum placeholders with production-ready copy or remove non-user-facing fillers.

history.notes: Found lorem ipsum placeholder text in signatures.

findings.title: Missing Error Boundaries
findings.description: Major sections like ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, and Admin Metrics lack error boundaries; only WorkspacePage implements one.

proof_hooks.summary: Route components rendered without error boundaries

findings.impact: Errors inside these routes can crash the entire app instead of containing failures to the affected surface.

suggested_fix.approach: Wrap each major route component in an ErrorBoundary to isolate failures and present user-friendly fallbacks.
tests_needed: Route-level rendering with simulated errors shows fallback UI instead of crashing.

history.notes: Noted absence of error boundaries on key routes.

findings.title: Unhelpful Empty States
findings.description: Workspace empty state messaging is intentionally vague and lacks guidance for the next action.

proof_hooks.summary: Empty state copy provides no CTA

findings.impact: Users landing on an empty workspace do not receive cues on what to do next, slowing activation.

suggested_fix.approach: Add actionable empty state guidance (CTA button or checklist) to direct users toward creating their first asset.

history.notes: Empty state lacks direction for new users.

findings.title: Unhelpful Image Alt Text
findings.description: Images use generic alt text like 'Generated' or raw asset names without context for screen readers.
findings.impact: Screen reader users cannot determine the purpose of generated images, reducing accessibility and usability.

suggested_fix.approach: Provide descriptive alt text conveying the image purpose and relevant context instead of generic labels.
tests_needed: Accessibility snapshot confirms alt text reflects image purpose.

history.notes: Identified generic alt text on generated images.

findings.title: Undefined Product Voice
findings.description: The intended product voice and tone are not explicitly defined in design tokens or documentation.

proof_hooks.summary: UI copy lacks reference to a documented voice guide

findings.impact: Without a defined voice, copy may shift tone across features, leading to inconsistent user experience.

suggested_fix.approach: Draft and socialize a concise product voice guide covering tone, capitalization, and preferred phrasing for common actions.

history.notes: Voice and tone guidelines not found.

next_actions.action: Add route-level error boundaries for major surfaces in App.tsx
next_actions.rationale: Prevents app-wide crashes when a page-level error occurs.

next_actions.action: Standardize critical auth and save action copy
next_actions.rationale: Reduces user confusion by unifying primary CTA labels.

next_actions.action: Publish a brief product voice guide
next_actions.rationale: Aligns future copy changes to a single tone and capitalization style.
